e1.assumptions: Phase 1 and Phase 2 combined rough count. Spike required before Phase 2 stories can be scoped — story count may reduce if spike produces REDESIGN. Gauge captured at month start (Pro+ counter reset May 1).

e2.notes: 16 stories across 4 epics. 14 MVP scope items covered. 2 additional stories (wuce.7 programme status view, wuce.8 annotation) traceable to P3/P4 metrics — not scope creep. Phase 1 = 8 stories (E1+E2), Phase 2 = 8 stories (E3+E4).

spike.question: Can the GitHub Copilot CLI or Copilot API be invoked non-interactively server-side with an assembled SKILL.md prompt and return structured, parseable output — enabling Phase 2 skill execution from a web backend?
spike.unblockedStage: definition (Phase 2 skill execution epic + M1 metric)

definition.scopeAccumulatorVerdict: No scope drift detected. All 14 MVP items covered. 16 stories across 4 epics.
definition.slicingStrategy: Walking skeleton first (E1), then user journey by phase (E2 Phase 1 full surface, E3 Phase 2 backend engine, E4 Phase 2 browser UI)

After review passes with no HIGH findings per story, proceed to /test-plan then /definition-of-ready.
